data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic confirmation if not cancelled, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the system performs this action under the specified conditions. The linked use case describes the process but lacks concrete evidence of the automatic confirmation functionality being executed, leading to a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system automatically confirms bookings if not cancelled within the hold period.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
